name: mas-scholar-skills
description: Repo-tracked Codex plugin for MAS Scholar Skills capability modules, medical-paper specialist skills, and refs-only skill entry.

interface.shortDescription: Codex skill entry for MAS medical-paper specialist capabilities.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex skill entry for the ten MAS Scholar Skills capability modules, the eight MAS medical-paper specialist skills including medical data governance, standard opl scholar-skills CLI readbacks, refs-only materialized candidate packages, and MAS owner-gated authority boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use MAS Scholar Skills to inspect MAS medical-paper capability modules.
Materialize a refs-only ScholarSkills candidate package.
Check ScholarSkills authority boundaries before a MAS handoff.
